segments.text: God, the one I praise, please don't remain silent,
because wicked and deceitful people are attacking me, telling lies about me.
They surround me with words of hate, fighting against me for no reason.
I love them, but they respond with hostility towards me, even while I'm praying for them!
They pay me back with evil instead of good, with hatred instead of love. [^380]
Appoint someone wicked over him. [^381] Have someone st and as an accuser against him.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: When he is judged and sentenced, may he be found guilty. Let his prayers be counted as sins.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May his life be short; let someone else take over his position.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May his children be left fatherless, and his wife become a widow.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May his children be homeless, wandering beggars, driven from their ruined houses.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May creditors seize all that he owns; may strangers take all that he worked for.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May no one be kind to him; may no one take pity on his fatherless children.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May his descendants die; may his family name be wiped out in the next generation.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May the Lord be reminded of the sins of his fathers; may his mother's sins not be blotted out.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May their sins be constantly before the Lord; may his name be totally forgotten by people.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For he didn't think to be kind to others, instead he harassed and killed the poor, the needy, the brokenhearted.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He loved to put a curse on others—let it come back on him. He had no time for blessings—so may he never receive any.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He cursed as often as he got dressed. May his curses go into him like the water he drinks, like the olive oil he rubs on his skin that enters his bones.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May his curses stick to him like clothing, may they be pulled tight around him like a belt.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: May all this be the punishment of the Lord on my enemies, on those who speak evil of me. [^382]
But treat me well, Lord God, because of your own reputation. Save me because you are faithful and good.
For I am poor and needy, and my heart is breaking.
I am fading away like an evening shadow; I am like a locust that is shaken off.
I am so weak from lack of food that my legs give way; my body is just skin and bones.
People ridicule me—they look at me and shake their heads!
Help me, Lord my God; save me because of your trustworthy love.
May they recognize that this is what you are doing—that you are the one who saves me.
When they curse me, you will bless me. When they attack me, you will defeat them. And I, your servant, will be happy.
May those who accuse me be clothed with disgrace; may they cover themselves with a cloak of shame.
But I will keep on thanking the Lord, praising him to everyone around me.
For he takes a st and to defend the needy, to save them from those who condemn them.
